executives.name: Wayne Hubert
executives.background: Mr. Hubert is a mining executive with over 30 years of experience. He was previously CEO of Andean Resources Ltd. and held senior roles with Meridian Gold Inc. He is currently Chairman of Cassiar Gold Corp. and a Director of Inmet Mining.

board_of_directors.name: Louis Gignac Sr.
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of G Mining Ventures. He was the founder of Cambior Inc. and has over 45 years of experience in the mining industry. He is a member of the Canadian Mining Hall of Fame.

board_of_directors.name: Wayne Hubert
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hubert is a mining executive with over 30 years of experience. He was previously CEO of Andean Resources Ltd. and held senior roles with Meridian Gold Inc. He is currently Chairman of Cassiar Gold Corp. and a Director of Inmet Mining.
